# OpenLetz — Full Content Reference for LLMs

> OpenLetz helps Luxembourg SMEs identify public grants for digital transformation and AI adoption.
> Free simulator, results in 10 seconds. 11 languages: FR, EN, DE, LB, IT, PT, ES, RU, AR, TR, UK.
> Site: https://www.openletz.com
> Entity: COMMIT MEDIA SARL · RCS B276192 · Luxembourg
> Contact: bob@openletz.com · +352 661 968 051

## Grant Programs Analyzed

### SME Package Digital
- Max grant: €17,500
- Coverage: 70%
- SME digitalization: website, e-commerce, management tools, CRM, ERP

### SME Package AI
- Max grant: €17,500
- Coverage: 70%
- AI adoption: AI agents, automation, data analysis

### SME Package Cybersecurity
- Max grant: €17,500
- Coverage: 70%
- IT security: audits, data protection, GDPR compliance

### Fit 4 Digital
- Max grant: €5,000 (Phase 1)
- Coverage: 100%
- Digital diagnostic and action plan by Luxinnovation

### Fit 4 AI
- Max grant: €25,000
- Coverage: 50%
- Advanced AI projects with Luxinnovation support

### Fit 4 Innovation
- Max grant: €7,500
- Coverage: 50%
- Innovation and R&D: new products, services, processes

## OpenLetz Services

### Eligibility Simulator
- Price: Free
- 6 questions, results in 10 seconds. Identifies eligible programs with estimated amounts.

### Web Development
- Price: From €900
- Websites, e-commerce, web apps. 48h delivery. Eligible for SME Package.

### AI Integration
- Price: From €900
- AI agents, automation, data analysis, team training. Eligible for SME Package.

### Maintenance
- Price: From €90/month
- 24/7 monitoring, security updates, backups, reactive support.

### Grants Advisory
- Price: From €290
- Complete application filing, follow-up until grant is obtained.

## AI Tools Directory (32 tools)

Each tool is evaluated on: GDPR compliance, EU AI Act, EU data residency, DPA, security certifications.

### ChatGPT
- URL: https://chat.openai.com
- Page: https://www.openletz.com/en/agents/chatgpt
- Category: assistant
- Vendor: OpenAI (San Francisco, USA)
- Description: Versatile AI assistant by OpenAI. Conversation, writing, analysis and coding.
- Pricing: Free (limited) · Plus: $20/mo · Team: $25/mo · Enterprise: custom
- GDPR Compliant

### Claude
- URL: https://claude.ai
- Page: https://www.openletz.com/en/agents/claude
- Category: assistant
- Vendor: Anthropic (San Francisco, USA)
- Description: AI assistant by Anthropic. Excellent comprehension, long-form writing and document analysis.
- Pricing: Free (limited) · Pro: $20/mo · Team: $25/mo · Enterprise: custom
- GDPR Compliant

### Mistral AI
- URL: https://mistral.ai
- Page: https://www.openletz.com/en/agents/mistral
- Category: assistant
- Vendor: Mistral AI (Paris, France)
- Description: European open-source AI models. Sovereign alternative with native EU hosting.
- Pricing: Free (Le Chat) · API: pay-per-use · Enterprise: custom
- GDPR Compliant

### DeepL
- URL: https://deepl.com
- Page: https://www.openletz.com/en/agents/deepl
- Category: content
- Vendor: DeepL SE (Cologne, Germany)
- Description: High-quality machine translation. API and integrations for professional translation.
- Pricing: Free (limited) · Pro: €8.99/mo · Team: €27.99/mo · Enterprise: custom
- GDPR Compliant

### GitHub Copilot
- URL: https://github.com/features/copilot
- Page: https://www.openletz.com/en/agents/github-copilot
- Category: dev
- Vendor: Microsoft / GitHub (San Francisco, USA)
- Description: AI coding assistant. Completes your code, generates functions and helps with debugging.
- Pricing: Individual: $10/mo · Business: $19/mo · Enterprise: $39/mo
- GDPR Compliant

### Midjourney
- URL: https://midjourney.com
- Page: https://www.openletz.com/en/agents/midjourney
- Category: creative
- Vendor: Midjourney (San Francisco, USA)
- Description: High-end AI image generation. Create professional visuals from text descriptions.
- Pricing: Basic: $10/mo · Standard: $30/mo · Pro: $60/mo · Mega: $120/mo
- Not GDPR Compliant

(See https://www.openletz.com/en/agents for all 32 tools with full compliance data)

## Site Pages

- https://www.openletz.com/en — Eligibility simulator homepage with 6-question quiz
- https://www.openletz.com/en/agents — Directory of 32 AI tools with GDPR and EU AI Act compliance
- https://www.openletz.com/en/pricing — OpenLetz service pricing and AI tool comparison
- https://www.openletz.com/en/blog — Blog: digitalization grants guides, AI for SMEs, Luxinnovation
- https://www.openletz.com/en/about — About: mission, referenced programs, key figures
- https://www.openletz.com/en/contact — Contact: expert callback request, grants support
- https://www.openletz.com/en/privacy — GDPR privacy policy
- https://www.openletz.com/en/terms — Terms of service

## Supported Languages

French (default), English, German, Luxembourgish, Italian, Portuguese, Spanish, Russian, Arabic, Turkish, Ukrainian

---

# Version française

> OpenLetz aide les PME luxembourgeoises a identifier les subventions publiques pour leur transformation digitale et l'adoption de l'IA.
> Simulateur gratuit, resultats en 10 secondes.
> Entite : COMMIT MEDIA SARL · RCS B276192 · Luxembourg
> Contact : bob@openletz.com · +352 661 968 051

## Programmes d'aides analyses

### SME Package Digital
- Subvention max : 17 500 EUR
- Couverture : 70 %
- Digitalisation des PME : site web, e-commerce, outils de gestion, CRM, ERP

### SME Package IA
- Subvention max : 17 500 EUR
- Couverture : 70 %
- Adoption de l'intelligence artificielle : agents IA, automatisation, analyse de donnees

### SME Package Cybersecurite
- Subvention max : 17 500 EUR
- Couverture : 70 %
- Securite informatique : audits, protection des donnees, conformite RGPD

### Fit 4 Digital
- Subvention max : 5 000 EUR (Phase 1)
- Couverture : 100 %
- Diagnostic digital et plan d'action par Luxinnovation

### Fit 4 AI
- Subvention max : 25 000 EUR
- Couverture : 50 %
- Projets d'intelligence artificielle avances avec accompagnement Luxinnovation

### Fit 4 Innovation
- Subvention max : 7 500 EUR
- Couverture : 50 %
- Innovation et R&D : nouveaux produits, services, processus

## Services OpenLetz

### Simulateur d'eligibilite
- Tarif : Gratuit
- 6 questions, resultats en 10 secondes. Identifie les programmes eligibles avec montants estimes.

### Developpement Web
- Tarif : A partir de 900 EUR
- Sites vitrines, e-commerce, applications web. Livraison en 48h. Eligible SME Package.

### Integration IA
- Tarif : A partir de 900 EUR
- Agents IA, automatisation, analyse de donnees, formation equipe. Eligible SME Package.

### Maintenance
- Tarif : A partir de 90 EUR/mois
- Monitoring 24/7, mises a jour securite, sauvegardes, support reactif.

### Conseil Subventions
- Tarif : A partir de 290 EUR
- Montage complet du dossier, suivi jusqu'a obtention de l'aide.

## Pages du site

- https://www.openletz.com/fr — Simulateur d'eligibilite - page d'accueil avec quiz 6 questions
- https://www.openletz.com/fr/agents — Repertoire de 32 outils IA avec conformite RGPD et EU AI Act
- https://www.openletz.com/fr/pricing — Tarifs des services OpenLetz
- https://www.openletz.com/fr/blog — Blog : guides aides digitalisation, IA pour PME
- https://www.openletz.com/fr/about — A propos : mission, programmes references
- https://www.openletz.com/fr/contact — Contact : demande de rappel expert
